seoTitle: How to Set Up a Gumroad Account and Store
metaDescription: Set up a Gumroad account, customize your storefront and branding, and configure payment settings so you're ready for your first sale.
intro: Starting to sell digital products on Gumroad begins with setting up your account and shaping your storefront so it reflects your brand before customers ever land on it. This guide covers creating the account, adding branding details, and configuring payment settings to get your store sale-ready.

steps.heading: Create your Gumroad account
steps.body: Sign up for Gumroad using your email or another supported signup method.

steps.heading: Complete profile and store setup
steps.body: Fill in your profile details and initial store information so your presence is ready to customize.

steps.heading: Add branding and store details
steps.body: Upload branding elements and write out your store details so it looks professional to visitors.

steps.heading: Configure payment settings
steps.body: Set up your payment and payout settings so you can actually receive money from sales.

steps.heading: Prepare for your first sale
steps.body: Review your storefront as a customer would, checking that branding, details, and payment setup are all in order.

faq.question: Is it free to create a Gumroad account and store?
faq.answer: Yes, creating an account and setting up your storefront is free — Gumroad takes a percentage of sales instead of charging upfront fees.

faq.question: Do I need a business entity to sell on Gumroad?
faq.answer: No, individual creators can sell on Gumroad without a registered business, though payout requirements may vary by country.

faq.question: How long does it take to get paid after a sale?
faq.answer: Payout timing depends on your configured payment settings and Gumroad's payout schedule, which you set up during account configuration.

faq.question: Can I customize how my storefront looks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add branding elements and store details to shape how your storefront presents to visitors.
